step_rationale: Post-MI remodeling marker; fibroblast proliferation regulation.
mechanism: NEIL3 regulates fibroblast proliferation and DNA repair during myocardial remodeling after infarction, contributing to scar formation and ventricular function.

references.title: NEIL3-Dependent Regulation of Cardiac Fibroblast Proliferation Prevents Myocardial Rupture.
